revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:平松王子]]
'''Hiramatsu Ōji''' is one of the {{ill|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|fr|Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=99 ōji Shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} on the [[Kumano Kodō]].
==Overview== {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | Name = {{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483087}} | image = [[File:平松王子跡.jpeg|thumb|200px|平松王子跡]] | location = {{ill|Saiwai-chō|ja|幸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiwai-chō|1=saiwaichou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10282170}}, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|qid=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, Japan | coordinates = | deity = | Affiliation = {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|qid=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kumano Pilgrimage|ja|熊野信仰|1=Kumano Faith|2=ja|3=熊野信仰|qid=Q135501741}}{{efn|The religion of [[Kumano Shrines]]|1=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Three Shrines|lt=Kumano faith|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Pilgrimage|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Three Shrines|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊野三山}} | Established = | Map = | location = {{ill|Izumi|qid=Q696412|1=Izumi, Osaka}} | part_of = {{ill|Kujūku-ōji|qid=Q3200280|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines}} }}
'''{{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483087}}''' (ひらまつおうじ) was the 10th {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} shrine along the historic {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|qid=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} pilgrimage route. The shrine no longer exists, but a stone monument marks its former site.
== History == A stone monument commemorating the former site of Hiramatsu Ōji stands in front of the {{ill|Hōkō Pond|ja|放光池|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōkō Pond|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} No.1 Park in {{ill|Saiwai-chō|ja|幸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiwai-chō|1=saiwaichou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10282170}} 3-chōme, {{ill|Izumi, Osaka|en|Izumi, Osaka|qid=Q696412|lt=Izumi, Osaka|1=Izumi, Osaka}}. The shrine's deity has been enshrined at {{ill|Hakuta Shrine|ja|伯太神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuta Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, located at 伯太町5-22 in Izumi.
== Access == * '''{{ill|Shinodayama Station|en|Shinodayama Station|qid=Q856945|lt=Shintoyama Station|1=Shinodayama Station}}''' on the {{ill|Hanwa Line|en|Hanwa Line|qid=Q1154800|lt=Hanwa Line|1=Hanwa Line}}, operated by {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}}, is the nearest station to both the stone monument and Hakuta Shrine.
== See also == * {{ill|Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano shrine|lt=Kumano Sanzan|ja|熊野三山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Sanzan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Kumano Kodō|en|Kumano Kodō|qid=Q17050475|lt=Kumano Kodō|1=Kumano Kodō}} - {{ill|Kiiji|ja|紀伊路|1=Kiiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiiji|qq=}} * {{ill|Kumano Ōji|ja|九十九王子|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|2=ja|3=九十九王子|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|4=fr|5=Kujūkuōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji|1=Ninety-Nine Ōji Shrines|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano Ōji|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninety-Nine Ōji|lt=Ninety-Nine Ōji|qq=}} *: {{ill|Shinoda Ōji|ja|篠田王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinoda Ōji|1=Shinoda Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11603815}} * '''{{ill|Hiramatsu Ōji|ja|平松王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiramatsu Ōji|1=Hiramatsu Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483087}}''' - {{ill|Inokuchi Ōji|ja|井ノ口王子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inokuchi Ōji|1=Inokuchi Ōji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11372756}}
{{Shinto Sidebar}} {{shinto-stub}}
==References==
